pr.title: Record: 11L XSA4 + Multi-Pass Streaming Score-First Legal TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.0523)

output.summary: Three-pass streaming score-first TTT scores each token before adaptation and takes per-token min NLL so every token can benefit from a late-pass prediction.
techniques: Multi-pass streaming score-first TTT with per-token min NLL selection
Pre-score tokens under torch.inference_mode before every adaptation pass
Clone rotary cache tensors so partial RoPE gradients survive TTT
